message:
🐛 Add console repos to devstat-funcs DEFAULT_REPOS (#1518)

The devstat-funcs.js Google Sheets helper was missing kubestellar/console,
kubestellar/console-marketplace, and kubestellar/console-kb from its
DEFAULT_REPOS list. This caused contribution points from these repos to
not be reflected in the contribution ladder spreadsheet tracking.

The leaderboard generation script (generate-leaderboard.mjs) already
included these repos, but the devstat functions used by the Google Sheets
integration did not.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
